title: Macro library (AxMacroDictionary) with flight #defines, consumed from X++
instruction: In the sandbox model, create a macro library the platform way. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="macros"). Create: (1) a macro library DemoModuleFlights (d365fo_file objectType "macro") whose Source declares exactly two flight constants, `#define.DemoFastPostingFlight('DemoFastPostingFlight')` and `#define.DemoBulkImportFlight('DemoBulkImportFlight')` - one #define per line, no other content; (2) a class DemoFlightReader whose declaration area includes the library with the include directive and whose `public static boolean isFastPostingEnabled()` returns the flight state for #DemoFastPostingFlight. Both objects must build with zero BP errors. NOTE: the macro library is the only place a #define belongs here - the class must not redeclare the constants locally.
